name: No Bake High-Protein Peanut Nutter Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together with a fork in a bowl until well combined.
2. Turn the mixture into a lightly oiled 8-inch glass square or metal baking dish.
- Note: This will not be baked.
3. Spread the mixture evenly and chill.
4. Cut into little squares.
